title: Commission-Only AI Agency Sales Rep (1099) — Recurring Income
headline: Earn $300-$1,500 per close + recurring monthly commission. Fully systemized offer. You sell, we deliver.
body:
NY Spotlight Report is looking for commission-only 1099 sales reps to sell our AI automation packages to small businesses, agencies, and service providers.

WHAT YOU'RE SELLING:
AI agency automation packages ($97/mo to $4,997) that we deliver fully done-for-you. You close the deal. Our system handles everything after.

COMMISSION:
- ProFlow AI ($97/mo): $40/mo recurring per client
- ProFlow Growth ($297/mo): $100/mo recurring per client
- DFY Setup ($1,497 one-time): $500 flat commission
- DFY Agency ($997/mo): $300/mo recurring per client
- Enterprise ($4,997): $1,500 flat

Recurring commissions are the real value. Close 3 DFY clients = $900/mo in passive income just from those accounts, month after month.

WHAT YOU GET:
- Sales deck, cold email templates, objection handling scripts
- Your own tracked Stripe checkout link
- Online rep portal with commission dashboard
- Product demo Loom to share with prospects
- Support from our AI-powered sales system

IDEAL BACKGROUND:
- Freelance marketing consultant or agency owner with existing relationships
- Virtual assistant or OBM who works with business owners
- Sales professional who wants recurring income on top of base

APPLY: nyspotlightreport.com/reps/apply

This is commission-only, 1099. No base salary. You own your schedule completely.
